domain: railway signaling interlocking + absolute block (signals and points coordinated in locked sequence; one train per block; route locking + interlocking table + mutual locking + sectional release)
specific_mechanism: Pre-declared routes acquire locks; interlocking compatibility table prevents conflicting routes; section-by-section release as train clears. Mechanical/electrical correctness check.
llm_application: IRMEX: agents declare ordered block routes; interlocking table determines compatibility; conflicting routes queued; sectional release frees trailing blocks. Verifiable interlocking-table checker enforces correctness.
novelty_claim: MAS Survey (2501.06322), Why MAS Fail (2503.13657), Institutional AI (2601.11369) cover cooperation/failure/external-constraint. None retrieve pre-declared route-lock + interlocking-table-checker + sectional-release LLM MAS coordination.
